tagline: Gantt charts now available: Gantt charts display tasks as horizontal bars on a continuous axis to visualize project schedules, manufacturing workflows, and other time ranged events.
what_it_does: Gantt charts now available: Gantt charts display tasks as horizontal bars on a continuous axis to visualize project schedules, manufacturing workflows, and other time ranged events. Each bar requires matching start and end field types (date, datetime, or numeric). Custom visualizations (Public Preview): Build custom charts with the Vega Lite library for customization beyond the built in visualization types.
why_it_matters: For small datasets, filters are applied in the browser to optimize performance.
